title: staurogyne andamanica
intro: Staurogyne andamanica is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Staurogyne andamanica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
